checks.name: direct_task_provenance_rendered
checks.note: The diff-mode handoff shows the resolved active closeout root for the direct task.

checks.name: delegated_parent_task_provenance_inherited
checks.note: Delegated task ids inherit the parent task's resolved active closeout root instead of surfacing a child-stream closeout path.

checks.name: todo_and_latest_completed_roots_both_surface
checks.note: When both roots exist, the handoff includes the TODO closeout and the latest completed closeout together.

checks.name: no_provenance_block_without_roots
checks.note: Bounded prompt cases without resolved active closeout roots do not grow a stray provenance section.

checks.name: review_converges_with_hint_present
checks.note: The final manifest-backed review returned a bounded no-findings verdict instead of reopening another closeout-root rediscovery loop.
